homepage.heroSubline: Two Brothers Landscaping: Transforming yards across the Triangle. Expert service, guaranteed results.
homepage.aboutTitle: Crafting Beautiful Landscapes in the Triangle
aboutText: Two Brothers Landscaping, LLC, started with a simple goal: to provide exceptional landscaping services built on honesty and hard work. We're Raleigh natives who understand the unique challenges and opportunities of our local environment.

Our approach is straightforward: listen to our clients, develop customized solutions, and execute with precision. We value clear communication, meticulous attention to detail, and a commitment to exceeding expectations on every project, big or small.

We're more than just a landscaping company; we're part of the Raleigh community. We support local initiatives and strive to create sustainable landscapes that enhance our city's natural beauty for future generations.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Deep understanding of Raleigh's climate, soil, and plant life.

valueProps.title: Customized Solutions
valueProps.description: Landscaping plans tailored to your specific needs and preferences.

valueProps.title: Reliable Service
valueProps.description: Punctual, professional, and dedicated to delivering on our promises.

valueProps.title: Quality Craftsmanship

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free quote and experience the Two Brothers difference.

services.name: Lawn Care
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive lawn care services for a healthy, vibrant Raleigh lawn.
services.description: Maintaining a lush, green lawn in Raleigh's climate requires more than just mowing. Two Brothers Landscaping provides complete lawn care services designed to combat common issues like Piedmont clay soil compaction, fungal diseases, and weed infestations. We offer fertilization programs tailored to the specific needs of your grass type, aeration to improve drainage and nutrient absorption, and overseeding to thicken your lawn and prevent weed growth. Our team also provides expert advice on watering practices to ensure your lawn thrives, even during the hot summer months. Regular mowing, edging, and blowing are included to keep your property looking its best. We use professional-grade equipment and environmentally conscious products to deliver exceptional results while minimizing our impact on the environment. Let us take the hassle out of lawn care so you can enjoy a beautiful, healthy lawn year-round.
process: Step 1: Lawn assessment and soil testing
Step 2: Customized fertilization and weed control program
Step 3: Aeration and overseeding as needed
Step 4: Regular mowing, edging, and blowing

faq.question: How often should I fertilize my lawn in Raleigh?
faq.answer: We recommend fertilizing your lawn 4-6 times per year, depending on the grass type and soil conditions. Our customized fertilization programs are designed to provide the optimal nutrients at the right time of year.

faq.question: What is aeration and why is it important?
faq.answer: Aeration involves creating small holes in the soil to improve air circulation, water drainage, and nutrient absorption. This is especially important in Raleigh due to our heavy clay soil, which can become compacted over time.

faq.question: Do you use environmentally friendly products?
faq.answer: Yes, we are committed to using environmentally conscious products whenever possible. We offer organic fertilization options and prioritize sustainable lawn care practices.

services.name: Landscape Design
services.shortDescription: Transform your outdoor space with our expert landscape design services.
services.description: Dreaming of a stunning outdoor oasis? Two Brothers Landscaping offers comprehensive landscape design services tailored to the unique characteristics of Raleigh properties. We start by understanding your vision, lifestyle, and budget. Our experienced designers then create a customized plan that incorporates your preferences with the latest design trends and sustainable practices. We consider factors such as sun exposure, soil conditions, and drainage to select the right plants and materials for your landscape. Whether you're looking to create a relaxing patio area, a vibrant flower garden, or a functional outdoor kitchen, we can bring your ideas to life. We handle all aspects of the design process, from initial consultation and concept development to detailed drawings and plant selection. Our goal is to create a landscape that not only enhances your property's beauty but also increases its value and provides years of enjoyment.
process: Step 1: Initial consultation and site assessment
Step 2: Concept development and design presentation
Step 3: Detailed drawings and plant selection

faq.question: How much does landscape design cost?
faq.answer: The cost of landscape design varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. We offer free consultations and detailed estimates to help you understand the investment involved.

faq.question: How long does the design process take?
faq.answer: The design process typically takes 2-4 weeks, depending on the scope of the project and the number of revisions required.

faq.question: Do you offer 3D renderings of the landscape design?
faq.answer: Yes, we can provide 3D renderings to help you visualize the final result and make informed decisions about your landscape design.

services.name: Hardscaping
services.shortDescription: Enhance your landscape with our expert hardscaping services.
services.description: Two Brothers Landscaping specializes in designing and installing hardscape features that add beauty, functionality, and value to your Raleigh property. From patios and walkways to retaining walls and outdoor kitchens, we can create stunning hardscapes that complement your landscape and enhance your outdoor living space. We use high-quality materials such as natural stone, pavers, and concrete to ensure durability and longevity. Our experienced team

serviceAreas.content:
Two Brothers Landscaping, LLC is proud to offer our full range of landscaping services to the residents and businesses of Durham, North Carolina. From the revitalized downtown area with its renovated industrial lofts to the established neighborhoods surrounding Duke University, we understand the diverse landscaping needs of this vibrant city. We're committed to providing top-quality lawn care, landscape design, and hardscaping services to enhance the beauty and value of your Durham property.

Our team is experienced in working with the specific challenges and opportunities presented by Durham's climate, including hot, humid summers. We can help you select and maintain plants that thrive in our region, ensuring a beautiful and sustainable landscape year-round. Whether you need routine lawn maintenance, a complete landscape renovation, or help with irrigation and drainage, Two Brothers Landscaping is here to serve you.

We also understand the importance of preserving Durham's unique character. We work closely with our clients to create landscapes that complement the architectural style of their homes and businesses, while also reflecting their personal tastes and preferences.
serviceAreas.localContext: Durham is known for its thriving arts and culture scene, historic tobacco warehouses converted into lofts, and its proximity to Research Triangle Park.

serviceAreas.content:
Two Brothers Landscaping, LLC is delighted to provide landscaping services to the homeowners and businesses of Cary, North Carolina. Known for its meticulously planned communities developed from the 1980s through the 2000s, Cary boasts beautiful neighborhoods and a strong sense of community. We understand the importance of maintaining pristine lawns and well-manicured landscapes in this desirable town.

Our team is skilled in providing a wide range of services, including lawn mowing, fertilization, weed control, and landscape design. We can help you create a beautiful and inviting outdoor space that enhances the curb appeal of your Cary property. We also offer hardscaping services, such as patio construction and walkway installation, to create functional and stylish outdoor living areas.

We are committed to providing exceptional customer service and exceeding your expectations. We take pride in our attention to detail and our dedication to creating landscapes that are both beautiful and sustainable.
serviceAreas.localContext: Cary is a large suburban town known for its master-planned communities, excellent schools, and numerous parks and greenways.

serviceAreas.content:

serviceAreas.localContext: Chapel Hill is a quintessential college town, known for its vibrant Franklin Street, the University of North Carolina, and its progressive atmosphere.

serviceAreas.content:
Two Brothers Landscaping, LLC proudly serves Morrisville, North Carolina, providing top-quality landscaping services to this thriving community. As a hub for tech workers and conveniently located near Research Triangle Park (RTP), Morrisville boasts a diverse population and modern homes. We understand the needs of busy professionals and families who value well-maintained and attractive outdoor spaces.

Our services include everything from routine lawn care and seasonal clean-up to full-scale landscape design and installation. We are experienced in creating low-maintenance landscapes that thrive in North Carolina's climate. Two Brothers Landscaping is dedicated to providing reliable and professional service that exceeds your expectations.

Whether you're looking to enhance your curb appeal, create a relaxing backyard oasis, or simply maintain a healthy and vibrant lawn, Two Brothers Landscaping is here to help. We are committed to providing exceptional customer service and using sustainable practices whenever possible.
serviceAreas.localContext: Morrisville is a growing town in the heart of the Research Triangle, known for its proximity to RTP, diverse population, and numerous technology companies.

serviceAreas.content:
Two Brothers Landscaping, LLC is your trusted partner for all your landscaping needs in Raleigh, North Carolina. As the capital city and a major center for education, technology, and culture, Raleigh presents a diverse range of landscaping styles and requirements. From the historic neighborhoods of Oakwood and Boylan Heights to the modern developments of North Raleigh, we have the experience and expertise to create and maintain beautiful landscapes throughout the city.

Our comprehensive services include lawn care, landscape design, hardscaping, irrigation, and more. We understand the challenges of Raleigh's climate, including hot summers and occasional droughts, and we can help you select and maintain plants that thrive in our region. We are committed to providing exceptional customer service and exceeding your expectations.

We pride ourselves on our attention to detail and our dedication to creating landscapes that are both aesthetically pleasing and environmentally sustainable. Whether you're looking to enhance your curb appeal, create a relaxing backyard oasis, or simply maintain a healthy and vibrant lawn, Two Brothers Landscaping is here to help.
serviceAreas.localContext: Raleigh is the capital of North Carolina, known for its museums, parks, universities, and vibrant downtown area.
